---
title: "Structured Summary Contract"
description: "StructuredPayload data shapes for history summarization"
---

Summarization uses `StructuredPayload` with a `type` discriminator in
`payload.model.data`. There is no dedicated `SummaryPayload` class.

This keeps summarization on the generic structured payload while still carrying
the metadata history needs, especially `source_entry_ids`.

## Summary Request

Emitted by `HistoryHandlerElement.summary_candidate_output` when older
unsummarized entries cross `summary_token_threshold`.

```python
from pyllments.payloads import StructuredPayload

request = StructuredPayload(data={
    "type": "summary_request",
    "source_payloads": [message_payload, tool_response_payload],
    "source_entry_ids": ["entry-1", "entry-2"],
    "instructions": "Summarize decisions and unresolved questions.",
    "timestamp": 1710000000.0,
})
```

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `type` | Must be `"summary_request"`. |
| `source_payloads` | Raw payloads to summarize. |
| `source_entry_ids` | Ledger entry IDs covered by the request. |
| `instructions` | Optional request-specific summarization override. |
| `timestamp` | Request creation time. |

Helper builders live in `pyllments.payloads.structured.summary_contract`.

## Summary Artifact

Returned by `SummarizerElement.summary_output` and accepted on
`HistoryHandlerElement.summary_input`.

```python
summary = StructuredPayload(data={
    "type": "summary",
    "content": "The user chose SQLite persistence and wants concise docs.",
    "source_entry_ids": ["entry-1", "entry-2"],
    "strategy": "default",
    "model_name": "openai/gpt-4o-mini",
    "timestamp": 1710000100.0,
})
```

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `type` | Must be `"summary"`. |
| `content` | Summary text. |
| `source_entry_ids` | Ledger entries represented by this summary. |
| `strategy` | Optional strategy label. |
| `model_name` | Model that generated the summary. |
| `timestamp` | Artifact creation time. |

When `HistoryHandlerElement` accepts a structured summary, it appends the payload
to the ledger and marks exactly `source_entry_ids` as summarized.

## Context Conversion

`ContextBuilderElement` converts structured summaries (`type == "summary"`) into
a system `MessagePayload` prefixed with `Conversation summary:`.

Other `StructuredPayload` shapes are stringified conservatively and are not treated
as summaries for marking or conversion.

## Relationship To Messages

A plain `MessagePayload(role="system")` can still be accepted as a manual
summary, but it uses the legacy candidate bookmark path for marking entries.
Automated summarization should use `StructuredPayload` with `type: "summary"` so
marking stays tied to explicit entry IDs.
